title: Banyuls, Collioure, and a Region Fighting Everything for Survival
summary:
Gnarled, untrained vines rise a foot from the ground. Stone terraces of gneiss and gravel bend towards the Mediterranean. A system of interwoven channels – a peu de gall – helps carry away torrential rain, but does nothing for the searing heat and staggering winds. The latticed trenches, all laid by hand, provide the added […]

title: German Chardonnay Comes of Age
summary:
Few grapes are at once as popular and as reviled as Chardonnay, a variety that in many ways has become a victim of its own success.
